content: We can reframe a memory and reflection module as a built-in intrinsic curiosity reward generator for 2025 autonomous agents, where reflecting on older unprocessed memories creates a continuous stream of internal reward for exploring understudied parts of the agent's own experience, not just new external environments. This solves a key limitation of 2025 vanilla ICM agents, which only reward novel external observations and rapidly grow stagnant when operating in fixed, open-ended long-horizon environments.
